characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, fair complexion, messy brown hair. He has a clean-shaven face and a generally youthful appearance.
characters.wardrobe: Initially wearing a dark blue hoodie under an olive green jacket. Later seen wearing a simple light grey t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially awkward and embarrassed, later focused and determined.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, brown complexion, voluminous curly black hair. She has expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a rust-orange knit sweater and blue jeans.

characters.appearance: Older adult female, average build, fair complexion, short blonde/grey hair. She wears reading glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a floral patterned shirt under a brown apron with a 'FRESH MARKET' logo.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Did you find everything you were looking for? [Did you find everything you were looking for?]
Character B says: Yes, everything's perfect, thanks. [Yes, everything's perfect, thanks.]
Character C says: And for you, sir? Any help? [And for you, sir? Any help?]
Character B says: ये पूछ रही हैं कि तुम्हें कुछ और चाहिए? [She is asking if you need anything else?]
Character A says: नहीं, मेरा हो गया। [No, I'm done.]
Character B says: He's good, thank you! [He's good, thank you!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the learner's inability to communicate in English in a basic real-world situation.
- Highlights the embarrassment and awkwardness of needing a partner to translate.
- Sets up the emotional hook for why the learner needs Supernova to gain independence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
I HATED NEEDING HER TO SPEAK FOR ME. THAT'S WHY I USE SUPERNOVA
I HATE NEEDING IT

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Hello, excuse me, where is the billing counter? [Hello, excuse me, where is the billing counter?]
Unknown speaker says: Great job! Your pronunciation was spot on. [Great job! Your pronunciation was spot on.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the solution in action: the learner practicing English privately at home.
- Demonstrates Supernova's AI tutor providing immediate, encouraging feedback on real-world scenarios.
- Shifts the emotional tone from embarrassed to focused and confident.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
I HATED NEEDING HER TO SPEAK FOR ME. THAT'S WHY I USE SUPERNOVA
SO I STOPPED NEEDING IT

scenes.supernova_script: [music only, no speech] [[music only, no speech]]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final call to action.
- Reinforces the brand name and the core value proposition.
- Encourages immediate app download to start the learning journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Stop making her translate for you. Start speaking English confidently today.
